ops.title: assess daemon/serve.go local supervisor vs daemonkit/supervise
ops.description: daemon/serve.go carries a local `type supervisor struct` (superviseWatch/backoffAfter/reload — watch-engine reload + backoff) while synckit imports daemonkit proc/drain/daemon/trust/wire but never daemonkit/supervise. The overlap with supervise's child-restart semantics is low-confidence (different concern: engine reload vs child supervision) — assess whether adopting supervise.Supervisor simplifies it or whether the local one is rightly independent. Found during the 2026-07-19 fleet-migration audit.

ops.text: written verdict recorded (adopt daemonkit/supervise, or keep local with rationale)
